# ODB++ surface polygon fixture
# Used to test _parse_features() surface block handling.

# First polygon — fully closed with OE and SE
S P 0
OB 0.0 0.0 I
OS 1.0 0.0
OS 1.0 1.0
OS 0.0 1.0
OE
SE

# Second polygon — missing OE and SE intentionally — tests EOF flush
S P 0
OB 5.0 5.0 I
OS 6.0 5.0
OS 6.0 6.0
OS 5.0 6.0
# Missing OE and SE intentionally — tests EOF flush
